common.footer_brand: Free online calculators — easy to use on any device, no sign-up required.
common.cookie_text: This site uses cookies for Google AdSense advertising and anonymous analytics.

home.hero_subtitle: All the calculators you need, free and easy to use on any device
home.why_subtitle: Built for speed, accuracy, and simplicity.
home.feature_instant_desc: No signup, no download. Open the site and start calculating.
home.feature_privacy_desc: All calculations run in your browser — no data sent to servers.
home.feature_bilingual_desc: Available in Thai and English. Switch anytime.
home.faq_free_q: Is this website free to use?
home.faq_free_a: Yes, 100% free. No subscription, no signup required.
home.faq_bmi_a: BMI is calculated by dividing your weight in kg by your height in meters squared.
home.faq_data_a: No. All calculations happen entirely in your browser.
home.faq_loan_q: How does the loan calculator work?
home.faq_loan_a: It uses the standard amortization formula based on loan amount, interest rate, and period.
home.faq_mobile_a: Yes, fully responsive — works on PC, tablet, and mobile.
home.meta_description: Free online calculators — BMI, Age, Loan, GPA, Calorie, Unit converter, Currency and more. Easy to use on any device, no sign-up required.
home.meta_og_description: 10+ free online calculators. Easy to use on any device.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator Online — Free
bmi.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) to check your weight category and health status.
bmi.tip: A BMI between 18.5–24.9 is considered normal.

unit.title: Unit Converter Online — Free
unit.description: Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed, and more.

age.title: Age Calculator Online — Free
age.description: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days from your date of birth.

currency.title: Currency Converter Online — Free
currency.description: Convert between world currencies with approximate exchange rates.
currency.approximate_rates: Using approximate rates (could not fetch real-time data)

loan.title: Loan Calculator Online — Free
loan.description: Calculate monthly loan payments, total interest, and total amount payable.

percentage.title: Percentage Calculator Online — Free
percentage.description: Calculate percentages — find X% of Y, percentage change, and ratio percentages.

calorie.title: Calorie Calculator Online — Free
calorie.description: Calculate your daily calorie needs (TDEE) based on weight, height, age, and activity level.

date.title: Date Calculator Online — Free
date.description: Calculate the number of days between two dates, or add/subtract days from a date.

sleep.title: Sleep Calculator Online — Free
sleep.description: Calculate the best times to sleep or wake up based on 90-minute sleep cycles.
sleep.mode_bedtime: I want to wake up at...
sleep.mode_wake: I want to go to bed at...
sleep.tip: The body sleeps in 90-minute cycles. Waking at the end of a cycle feels more refreshing.

gpa.title: GPA Calculator Online — Free
gpa.description: Calculate semester GPA and cumulative GPA quickly and easily.
gpa.required_course: Add at least 1 course with credits

announcements.title: Announcements & News
announcements.description: Stay updated with the latest news and announcements from our team.

errors.404_desc: The page you're looking for may have been moved, deleted, or the URL is incorrect.
errors.500_desc: Sorry for the inconvenience. Please try again later.

about.title: About D-Calc
about.desc: D-Calc is a free online calculator hub for everyone. We build easy-to-use, fast, and accurate tools to make your everyday life easier.
about.mission_desc: Build the best calculator tools in Thailand — free, easy, and ad-friendly.
about.subtitle: Free online calculators — easy to use on any device, no sign-up required.
about.mission_long: We believe everyday calculations — BMI, loans, GPA, calories — should be free, fast, and accessible to everyone without intrusive popups or account requirements.
about.value_free_desc: Every tool is free, forever. No paywalls.
about.value_privacy_desc: Your data stays in your browser. We collect zero PII.
about.value_fast_desc: Designed for mobile & desktop. Available in Thai & English.
about.value_autosave_desc: Results are saved locally — reopen and continue where you left off.

random_number.title: Random Number Generator — Free
random_number.description: Generate random numbers in any range. Generate multiple numbers at once.
random_number.error_range: Min must be less than Max
random_number.error_count: Count exceeds available range (no duplicates allowed)

spin_wheel.title: Spin Wheel — Custom Random
spin_wheel.description: Custom spin wheel with your own options. Add any items and spin!
spin_wheel.default_items:

Option 6
spin_wheel.add_to_see_wheel: Add items to see the wheel

card_draw.description: Enter your list, choose how many to draw, and let fate decide.

storage.title: Storage Converter Online — Free
storage.description: Convert data storage units: Bit, Byte, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB — fast and accurate.

patch_notes.title: Patch Notes
patch_notes.subtitle: See what has changed in each version

contact.page_subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.privacy_note: Information you send will only be used to respond to your inquiry. We do not share your personal information with third parties.
